en.value:
National and Sub-National level capacity building for effective implementation and monitoring of Kala-Azar Elimination programme in Nepal

	Lymphatic Filariasis Elimination Programme supported for MDA and case management and post-MDA surveillance

	Integrated NTD activities for STH, LF and trachoma.

	Preventnion and control of major emerging re-emerging zoonotic diseases of public health importance in Nepal

	Sustain elimination of Leprosy as a public health problem from Nepal

	Community based vector surveillance and control strategy for dengue, leptospirosis,  chikungunya and others emerging vector borne diseases

	A simplified national intergated diseases surveillance for outbreak and epidemic prove disease developed and implemented in high priority areas

	Support Field Epidemiology Training Program

	Support on national RRT strengthening capability

	Health care capacity for appropriate dengue/DHF/DSS case management

	Capacity for Communicable diseases laboratory diagnosis strengthened

	Laboratory Quality System Improved

	Strengthening NIC

	Support for Implementation of IHR core capacities

	Strengthening of alert and response system for use and other public health emergencies for IHR implementation

	National Blood Program / Blood Transfusion Service strengthened at national, regional and district level

	Technically sound national strategy/guideline/policy documents to effectively enhance components of the national malaria control/elimination programme

	Strengthened malaria case management capacity at all levels through transfer of knowledge /skills

	Support for strengthening entomological component in NMCP to facilitate the effective malaria prevention/control activities

	Strengthening support for development and delivery of BCC/Advocacy campaigns/Trainings/Logistics for effective malaria program

	Support for use of quality assured drugs and diagnostics

	Utilisation of an integrated surveillance approach to effectively target national malaria control/elimination programme interventions

	Advances in entomological operational research output with national/local collaboration

	Support for conducting/moniotring therapeutic efficacy of the current anti-malarial drugs and evaluation of diagnostics in country conetxt

	Support for conducting advocacy meetings, proposal preparation and implementation of activities

en.full: SENEP1206530 - Diseases Surveillance and Epidemiology/Neglected Tropical Disease Elimination and Control/Malaria Elimination/Blood Safety and Laboratory Technology

version_summary.change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API
